# Palm Engine — LLM Guide

> Lightweight Behavior Tree orchestration for wizards, durable workflows, and human-in-the-loop processes in Python.

## Key Resources
- **Repository**: https://github.com/JGabrielGruber/palmengine
- **Live Demo / REPL**: Run `uv run palm repl`
- **Architecture**: https://palmengine.org#architecture or ARCHITECTURE.md
- **Core Concepts**: Behavior Trees, Execution Plans, Wizard Pattern, Instance Persistence
- **Install**: `pip install palmengine[cli]` (PyPI name; import `palm`, CLI `palm`)
- **Quickstart**: `pip install palmengine[cli] && palm doctor && palm wizard start onboard`
- **From source**: `uv sync --extra cli && uv pip install -e ".[cli]"`

## Philosophy
Filius philosophorum — orchestration that feels human, transactional, resumable.

For full code structure, see the repomix-output or explore src/palm/core/ (pure layer).
